title: Hiring Software Engineer at Dunzo Capital India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Dunzo Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo Capital India family as a Software Engineer in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo Capital India:
Dunzo Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Capital India!
